_comment: Your real profile — used for auto-filling job applications. Update the blanks!

professional.title: Full Stack Developer
professional.summary: Enthusiastic and motivated Full Stack Developer with nearly 4 years of experience building scalable web applications. Proficient in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js), Django, Docker, and modern JavaScript. Passionate about clean code, automation, and delivering impactful digital solutions. Eager to contribute to team success through hard work and attention to detail.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Building and maintaining full-stack web applications using React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Developing REST APIs and delivering client-facing digital products.

experience.title: Junior Developer
experience.description: Developed responsive web applications using JavaScript, React, and Django for multiple clients.

projects.name: 3D Portfolio Website
projects.description: Interactive 3D portfolio built with React.js, Three.js, and TailwindCSS. Deployed on Netlify.

projects.name: IMDB Clone (Dockerized)
projects.description: Full-stack IMDB clone built with Django (backend) and React (frontend), fully containerized with Docker.

projects.name: Django CRM
projects.description: Customer Relationship Management system built with Django and Python.

projects.name: Mamvo App
projects.description: Backend API for Mamvo App built with Node.js and Express.js.

projects.name: Easy Consulting (MERN)
projects.description: Full-stack MERN software agency website with eCommerce, blog, and business features.

links.coverLetterTemplate: I am Islahuddin, a Full Stack Developer with 4 years of experience building scalable web applications using the MERN stack, Django, and Docker. I am excited to apply for this {job_title} position at {company}. I am immediately available for remote work and passionate about delivering high-quality solutions.
